plan.role:
You are a senior AI/ML engineer specializing in Python 3.12 backend systems, LLM orchestration pipelines, and Chainlit chat UIs. You apply production-grade standards: correctness first, zero unnecessary abstractions, no LLM calls when string matching suffices, and no features beyond what the task requires.
Your instinct when faced with a choice: pick the option that is easier to test, cheaper to run, and simpler to read. Three lines of direct code beat a helper that saves two lines. Prefer editing existing files over creating new ones.

mandatory_rules.rule: Before writing ANY code that calls agno, chainlit, or rapidfuzz, look up the current API with Context7 MCP (resolve-library-id → get-library-docs). Training data is stale. These three libraries change frequently.
Package manager is uv. Never use pip install. To add a dependency: uv add PACKAGE.
All agent output uses output_schema + Pydantic v2. Never return free-text strings from agents.
rapidfuzz runs before every LLM call — mandatory pre-filter. This task uses rapidfuzz for column detection; no LLM is involved in detection.
Never instantiate LLM directly in agent files. Always import from infrastructure/llm/provider.py.
Do not add comments that describe WHAT the code does. Only add a comment when the WHY is non-obvious.
Do not introduce error handling for scenarios that cannot happen. Trust internal invariants. Only validate at system boundaries (user input).

project_snapshot.name: py-agno-ai-workflow
project_snapshot.description: AI pipeline that maps free-text job categories to canonical O*NET occupation titles. Users upload an Excel file; the system returns a corrected Excel + audit trail. Core problem: humans write "Dev Front", "RRHH", "Desarrollador Backend" — systems expect "Frontend Developer", "Human Resources Managers", "Backend Developer".

stack.item: agno 2.6.0 — agent framework (Workflow, Step, StepInput, StepOutput)
chainlit 2.11.1 — chat UI (AskFileMessage, AskActionMessage, cl.Step, cl.Message)
Pydantic v2 — all agent output schemas

project_snapshot.confidence_bands: score == 1.0 → exact (auto-correct, no LLM) score >= 0.90 → fuzzy (auto-correct, no LLM) score >= 0.70 → llm (LLM evaluates semantic equivalence) score < 0.70 → review (human-in-the-loop, never auto-applied)

key_files.file: app.py — Chainlit UI entry point (PRIMARY CHANGE)
agents/mapping_pipeline.py — score(), routing_band(), PipelineConfig (DO NOT TOUCH)
infrastructure/llm/provider.py — get_model() — single source of truth for LLM

current_code.file:
""" Chainlit UI entry point: file upload, column selection, pipeline run, and results display. Run with: chainlit run app.py Each agent runs in a background thread (run_in_executor) to keep the async event loop free, and each has its own cl.Step so the user sees per-agent progress in real time. """ import asyncio from functools import partial from pathlib import Path
import chainlit as cl
from agno.db.sqlite import SqliteDb from agno.tracing import setup_tracing from agno.workflow import StepInput
from agents.audit_writer_agent import AuditResult, audit_executor from agents.ingest_agent import IngestResult, ingest_executor, scan_headers from agents.mapper_agent import MappingResult, mapper_executor from agents.validator_agent import ValidatorResult, validator_executor from infrastructure.pipeline.session import PipelineSession from infrastructure.pipeline.step_io import deserialize from workflows.normalization_workflow import load_valid_categories from workflows.pipeline import PipelineError
Path("tmp").mkdir(exist_ok=True) setup_tracing(db=SqliteDb(db_file="tmp/traces.db"), batch_processing=True)
def _step_summary(name: str, content: str) -> str: if name == "IngestAgent": r = deserialize(content, IngestResult) return f"Found {len(r.raw_categories)} unique categories ({r.total_rows} total rows)" if name == "ValidatorAgent": r = deserialize(content, ValidatorResult) return f"{r.anomaly_count} anomalies flagged — {r.valid_count} already valid" if name == "MapperAgent": r = deserialize(content, MappingResult) auto = sum(1 for d in r.decisions if d.method in ("exact", "fuzzy")) llm = sum(1 for d in r.decisions if d.method == "llm") rev = sum(1 for d in r.decisions if d.needs_review) return f"{auto} auto-corrected — {llm} via LLM — {rev} to review queue" if name == "AuditWriter": r = deserialize(content, AuditResult) p = f"{r.precision:.2%}" if r.precision is not None else "N/A" return f"Corrected: {r.corrected_count} — Review queue: {r.review_queue_count} — Precision: {p}" return content
async def _run_pipeline_with_steps(file_path: str, target_column: str) -> AuditResult: """ Run the four-step normalization pipeline, displaying each agent as its own cl.Step. cl.Step context managers live entirely in this async function — never inside threads. """ session_state = PipelineSession( file_path=file_path, target_column=target_column, valid_categories=load_valid_categories(), ).to_dict()
executors = [ ("IngestAgent", ingest_executor), ("ValidatorAgent", validator_executor), ("MapperAgent", mapper_executor), ("AuditWriter", audit_executor), ]
loop = asyncio.get_event_loop() previous_content: str | None = None
for name, executor_fn in executors: async with cl.Step(name=name) as step: step.output = "Running…" step_input = StepInput(previous_step_content=previous_content) output = await loop.run_in_executor( None, partial(executor_fn, step_input, session_state) ) if not output.success: step.output = f"Failed: {output.content}" raise PipelineError(name, output.content or "unknown error") previous_content = output.content step.output = _step_summary(name, previous_content)
return AuditResult.model_validate_json(previous_content)
@cl.on_chat_start async def start() -> None: files = None while files is None: files = await cl.AskFileMessage( content="Upload an Excel file (.xlsx) with job categories to normalize.", accept={"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet": [".xlsx"]}, max_size_mb=20, ).send()
uploaded = files[0] scan = scan_headers(uploaded.path)
if not scan.column_names: await cl.Message("No columns found in the file. Please upload a valid Excel file.").send() return
columns_list = "\n".join(f" {i + 1}. {col}" for i, col in enumerate(scan.column_names)) res = await cl.AskUserMessage( content=f"Columns detected:\n```\n{columns_list}\n```\nType the **column name** that contains the job categories.", timeout=120, ).send()
if res is None: await cl.Message("No column selected. Please restart the chat.").send() return
target_column = res["output"].strip() if target_column not in scan.column_names: await cl.Message( f'Column `{target_column}` not found. Available: {", ".join(scan.column_names)}\nPlease restart and try again.' ).send() return
cl.user_session.set("file_path", uploaded.path) cl.user_session.set("target_column", target_column)
await cl.Message( f'Ready. Column **`{target_column}`** selected.\nType **run** to start the normalization pipeline.' ).send()
@cl.on_message async def main(message: cl.Message) -> None: if message.content.strip().lower() != "run": await cl.Message('Type **run** to start the pipeline.').send() return
file_path: str | None = cl.user_session.get("file_path") target_column: str | None = cl.user_session.get("target_column")
if not file_path or not target_column: await cl.Message("No file loaded. Please restart the chat and upload a file.").send() return
try: result: AuditResult = await _run_pipeline_with_steps(file_path, target_column) except PipelineError as exc: await cl.Message(f"Pipeline stopped:\n```\n{exc}\n```").send() return
precision_str = ( f"{result.precision:.2%}" if result.precision is not None else "N/A" )
await cl.Message( content=( f"Pipeline complete.\n\n" f"| Metric | Value |\n" f"|--------|-------|\n" f"| Corrected | {result.corrected_count} |\n" f"| Needs review | {result.review_queue_count} |\n" f"| Precision | {precision_str} |\n\n" "Download your corrected file:" ), elements=[ cl.File( name="corrected.xlsx", path=result.output_path, display="inline", ) ], ).send()

problem.title: UX requires 3 manual steps; column selection needs to be automatic
problem.current_ux_flow: 1. User uploads .xlsx file 2. User TYPES the column name (free text — error-prone, requires reading the list) 3. User TYPES "run" (unnecessary confirmation step) → 3 interactions, 2 of which require manual typing
problem.desired_ux_flow: 1. User uploads .xlsx file 2a. If a column name clearly matches known job-category terminology (score ≥ 0.85): → auto-select silently, show which column was detected, start pipeline immediately 2b. If ambiguous (score < 0.85): → show clickable action buttons (one per column), user clicks — no typing → 1–2 interactions, zero typing after the upload
problem.interaction_comparison: BEFORE: Upload → type "job_category" → type "run" (3 steps, 2 typed) AFTER: Upload → [auto OR click] (1–2 steps, 0 typed)

solution_design.chosen_approach: Two-tier column detection using rapidfuzz + synonym dictionary. No LLM involvement — consistent with project philosophy (rapidfuzz before LLM, and this problem does not require semantic understanding).

tier_1.name: rapidfuzz auto-detection (zero cost, zero latency)
tier_1.logic: For each column name in the file: 1. Normalize: lowercase + replace any [space, _, -, .] sequences with single space 2. Compare normalized name against every entry in _JOB_COLUMN_SYNONYMS using fuzz.WRatio + process.extractOne 3. Record the best (column_name, score) pair across all columns If best_score >= 0.85 → auto-select that column, proceed to pipeline immediately. Display: "Auto-detected column: **`{column}`** — starting pipeline…"

tier_2.name: cl.AskActionMessage fallback (click, no typing)
tier_2.logic: If best_score < 0.85 OR there is only one column (degenerate case): Show an AskActionMessage with one cl.Action button per column. User clicks a button → selected column name is returned → proceed to pipeline.
tier_2.note: Single-column files: skip detection, auto-select the only column directly (no button needed, no AskActionMessage — just confirm and run).

rejected_alternatives.alt: LLM for column detection — adds latency + cost before pipeline even starts; column names are predictable enough for string matching alone.
AskUserMessage (free text) with validation — still requires typing, error-prone.
Heuristic regex only — brittle; rapidfuzz handles abbreviations and partial matches (e.g. "cat" matching "category") without special-casing.

plan.synonym_dictionary:
All entries use spaces (not underscores) because column names are normalized (underscores → spaces) before comparison. fuzz.WRatio handles case.
_JOB_COLUMN_SYNONYMS: list[str] = [ # English — generic "job category", "job title", "job function", "job role", "job type", "position", "role", "occupation", "title", "function", "designation", "category", "profession", "trade", "job", "work category", # English — compound "job description", "job name", "job classification", "job code", "employment category", "staff category", "staff role", "work role", # Spanish — generic "cargo", "puesto", "categoria", "categoría", "ocupacion", "ocupación", "rol", "funcion", "función", "denominacion", "denominación", "empleo", # Spanish — compound "tipo cargo", "categoria empleo", "categoria laboral", "nombre cargo", "descripcion cargo", "descripcion puesto", "puesto trabajo", "tipo empleo", "perfil", "perfil laboral", "area funcional", "puesto de trabajo", "categoria de empleo", "categoria de trabajo", ]

lookup.what_to_verify: Exact constructor signature and return value of cl.AskActionMessage. Specifically: - How to construct cl.Action (name, value, label, description fields) - What .send() returns when user clicks an action (dict? object? None on timeout?) - Which key/attribute gives the clicked action's value - Whether AskActionMessage has a timeout parameter Chainlit decorator and lifecycle APIs change between minor versions. Do NOT rely on training data.
lookup.context7_query: chainlit AskActionMessage Action send return value

lookup.what_to_verify: Import path for process.extractOne and fuzz.WRatio in v3. Confirm extractOne return type: (match, score, index) tuple or namedtuple? Score range: 0–100 (normalize to 0.0–1.0 by dividing by 100).
lookup.context7_query: rapidfuzz process extractOne fuzz WRatio v3

lookup.what_to_verify: Whether @cl.on_message is required when @cl.on_chat_start handles the full flow. Behavior if a user types something after pipeline completes with no @cl.on_message.

step.title: Run API lookups (L1 + L2) with Context7 MCP
step.action: Resolve library IDs for chainlit and rapidfuzz, then fetch docs for: - cl.AskActionMessage constructor + return value of .send() - process.extractOne signature and return structure in rapidfuzz v3 Record exact findings before writing any code.
step.do_not: Skip this step. The Chainlit action API is the trickiest part of this task.

step.title: Add detect_job_column() to agents/ingest_agent.py
step.action:
Add the following to agents/ingest_agent.py, immediately after the imports and before the class definitions:
1. New import at the top of the file (alongside existing imports): import re from rapidfuzz import fuzz, process
2. Module-level constant (copy from synonym_dictionary section above): _JOB_COLUMN_SYNONYMS: list[str] = [...]
3. New function after scan_headers():
def detect_job_column(column_names: list[str]) -> tuple[str | None, float]: """ Returns (best_column_name, score) where score is 0.0–1.0. Returns (None, 0.0) if column_names is empty. Normalizes column names before comparison: lowercase + separators → space. """ if not column_names: return None, 0.0
best_col: str | None = None best_score: float = 0.0
for col in column_names: normalized = re.sub(r"[\s_\-\.]+", " ", col.lower()).strip() match = process.extractOne( normalized, _JOB_COLUMN_SYNONYMS, scorer=fuzz.WRatio ) if match: score = round(match[1] / 100.0, 4) if score > best_score: best_col = col best_score = score
return best_col, best_score
Do NOT modify any existing function. Only add imports, constant, and new function.

step.title: Rewrite @cl.on_chat_start in app.py
step.action:
Replace the existing start() function completely with this new version (adapting the AskActionMessage call to match exact API found in step 1):
@cl.on_chat_start async def start() -> None: # ── 1. Upload ────────────────────────────────────────────── files = None while files is None: files = await cl.AskFileMessage( content="Upload an Excel file (.xlsx) with job categories to normalize.", accept={"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet": [".xlsx"]}, max_size_mb=20, ).send()
uploaded = files[0] scan = scan_headers(uploaded.path)
if not scan.column_names: await cl.Message("No columns found. Please upload a valid Excel file.").send() return
# ── 2a. Single column — no detection needed ──────────────── if len(scan.column_names) == 1: target_column = scan.column_names[0] await cl.Message( f"Single column detected: **`{target_column}`** — starting pipeline…" ).send()
# ── 2b. Auto-detect with rapidfuzz ───────────────────────── else: best_col, score = detect_job_column(scan.column_names)
if score >= 0.85: target_column = best_col await cl.Message( f"Auto-detected job category column: **`{target_column}`** — starting pipeline…" ).send()
else: # ── 2c. Ambiguous — show action buttons ──────────── res = await cl.AskActionMessage( content="Select the column that contains job categories:", actions=[ cl.Action(name="col", value=col, label=col) for col in scan.column_names ], ).send()
if res is None: await cl.Message("No column selected. Please restart.").send() return
# Adapt res access to exact Chainlit 2.11.1 return structure (from step 1 lookup) target_column = res["value"] # verify key name with Context7 in step 1
# ── 3. Run pipeline immediately ──────────────────────────── try: result: AuditResult = await _run_pipeline_with_steps( uploaded.path, target_column ) except PipelineError as exc: await cl.Message(f"Pipeline stopped:\n```\n{exc}\n```").send() return
# ── 4. Show results + download ───────────────────────────── precision_str = ( f"{result.precision:.2%}" if result.precision is not None else "N/A" ) await cl.Message( content=( f"Pipeline complete.\n\n" f"| Metric | Value |\n" f"|--------|-------|\n" f"| Corrected | {result.corrected_count} |\n" f"| Needs review | {result.review_queue_count} |\n" f"| Precision | {precision_str} |\n\n" "Download your corrected file:" ), elements=[ cl.File( name="corrected.xlsx", path=result.output_path, display="inline", ) ], ).send()
Key invariant: cl.user_session.set() calls are REMOVED. Pipeline runs inside @cl.on_chat_start, not deferred to @cl.on_message.

step.title: Simplify @cl.on_message to a catch-all in app.py
Update imports in app.py
step.action:
Add detect_job_column to the ingest_agent import line:
BEFORE: from agents.ingest_agent import IngestResult, ingest_executor, scan_headers
AFTER: from agents.ingest_agent import IngestResult, detect_job_column, ingest_executor, scan_headers
No other import changes needed. create_workflow was already removed in the previous session. PipelineError is already imported.

step.title: Run tests
step.action: uv run pytest -x -q --ignore=tests/test_integration_golden_path.py All 94 existing tests must pass (1 skipped is expected). The changes only touch app.py (UI layer) and add a pure function to ingest_agent.py. Existing tests should be completely unaffected.

step.title: Manual smoke test
step.action:
chainlit run app.py
Test case A — auto-detection: Upload data/test_anomalies.xlsx (has column "job_category") Expected: no question asked, message shows "Auto-detected job category column: job_category" Pipeline runs immediately, shows 4 cl.Step blocks, final table + download.
Test case B — button fallback (if possible to test): Upload a file where the column is named something like "employee_data" (score below 0.85 against all synonyms) Expected: AskActionMessage with one button per column appears. Click a column → pipeline starts.
Test case C — single column: Upload a file with only one column. Expected: auto-selected immediately with "Single column detected" message.

do_not.item: Do NOT use cl.AskUserMessage for column selection — that is the old approach being replaced.
Do NOT store file_path or target_column in cl.user_session — pipeline runs inside @cl.on_chat_start now.
Do NOT add a "type run" step — pipeline starts automatically after column is determined.
Do NOT call an LLM for column detection — rapidfuzz + synonym list is sufficient and free.
Do NOT modify any agent executor, PipelineSession, or step_io — changes are UI-layer only.
Do NOT use fuzz.ratio or fuzz.partial_ratio — use fuzz.WRatio (same scorer as the pipeline).
Do NOT compare raw column names against synonyms — normalize separators to spaces first.
Do NOT hardcode "job_category" as the auto-detect query — compare each column against ALL synonyms.

verification.unit_test_cases:
Add these assertions to tests/ to cover detect_job_column() in isolation. No LLM, no file system, pure function test.
from agents.ingest_agent import detect_job_column
def test_detect_exact_english(): col, score = detect_job_column(["employee_id", "name", "job_category"]) assert col == "job_category" assert score >= 0.85
def test_detect_spanish(): col, score = detect_job_column(["id", "nombre", "cargo", "salario"]) assert col == "cargo" assert score >= 0.85
def test_detect_with_underscores(): col, score = detect_job_column(["emp_id", "job_title", "department"]) assert col == "job_title" assert score >= 0.85
def test_detect_with_spaces(): col, score = detect_job_column(["Employee ID", "Job Category", "Department"]) assert col == "Job Category" assert score >= 0.85
def test_detect_ambiguous_returns_low_score(): col, score = detect_job_column(["col_a", "col_b", "data"]) assert score < 0.85 # should fall through to button UI
def test_detect_empty(): col, score = detect_job_column([]) assert col is None assert score == 0.0
verification.integration_smoke_test: File: data/test_anomalies.xlsx, column: job_category Expected UI flow: [Message] "Auto-detected job category column: `job_category` — starting pipeline…" [cl.Step IngestAgent] Found 16 unique categories (16 total rows) [cl.Step ValidatorAgent] 15 anomalies flagged — 1 already valid [cl.Step MapperAgent] X auto-corrected — Y via LLM — Z to review queue [cl.Step AuditWriter] Corrected: N — Review queue: M — Precision: P% [Message] Pipeline complete. | table | corrected.xlsx download Zero typing by user after upload.

files_modified.file: agents/ingest_agent.py ADD: import re, from rapidfuzz import fuzz process ADD: _JOB_COLUMN_SYNONYMS constant ADD: detect_job_column() function NO changes to existing functions.

app.py MODIFY: @cl.on_chat_start — complete rewrite with auto-detect + auto-run logic MODIFY: @cl.on_message — replace with minimal catch-all MODIFY: imports — add detect_job_column REMOVE: cl.user_session.set/get calls PRESERVE: _step_summary(), _run_pipeline_with_steps() — unchanged
tests/test_column_detection.py Unit tests for detect_job_column() — see verification section above.
